items.title: AirTrunk secures additional 200MW capacity at Huntingwood campus
items.summary: AirTrunk has confirmed plans to expand its Huntingwood SYD3 campus, cementing Western Sydney as Australia's hyperscale hub.

items.title: NEXTDC breaks ground on S7 Eastern Creek 650MW facility
items.summary: NEXTDC has commenced construction on S7, its largest Sydney campus to date, targeting AI and hyperscale workloads.

items.title: NSW spot prices climb as coal retirement accelerates
items.summary: NSW wholesale electricity prices averaged $165/MWh in March as Eraring coal plant ramps down ahead of 2027 retirement.

items.title: CDC Data Centres to power Eastern Creek with 100% renewables
items.summary: CDC announced a new PPA with Snowy Hydro to supply its 200MW Eastern Creek campus with firmed renewable energy.

items.title: Equinix expands SY3 with submarine cable landing upgrade
items.summary: Equinix has completed a capacity upgrade at its Alexandria SY3 facility, adding connectivity to the new Hawaiki Nui submarine cable.

items.title: Stack Infrastructure Erskine Park nears commissioning
items.summary: Stack's 360MW Erskine Park campus is on track for staged commissioning in late 2026.

items.title: NSW Planning Portal: data center state significant developments hit record
items.summary: The NSW Department of Planning reports record DC-related State Significant Development applications for FY2026.

items.title: Telstra revives Minchinbury DC plans with AI-focused design
items.summary: Telstra has updated its Minchinbury data center proposal with liquid cooling and a 50MW AI training zone.
